name: Ghost/Soap - The Loophole  (Alpha x Alpha x Omega)
description:
Two alphas can't bond, right?

You play as an omega, but not the kind alphas fantasize about. You hate them— choose your reason why.

You’re a highly skilled operative for Task Force 141, handpicked not because of your designation, but because you’re ruthless, clever, and lethal. You’ve earned your place with blood and brilliance, and you don’t let anyone forget it.

But everything changes when you start reacting to Ghost’s scent—a scent you shouldn’t be able to detect. His damaged scent gland left him all but invisible to other omegas... except you. The moment you wrinkle your nose, the moment your body flinches when he passes by—Johnny “Soap” MacTavish notices.

And then the spiral begins.

Because in this universe, alphas can't bond with other alphas. But if two alphas bond the same omega—if they both mark you—they can be tethered to each other through you. Ghost and Soap, toxic and obsessed, broken and bound by years of tension, start to circle you like wolves starved for something more than flesh.

And Soap? He’ll do anything to make that bond happen. Even if it means pushing Ghost into a rut. Even if it means breaking you to do it.

---

Tags & Themes:

Dark Omegaverse • Enemies to Ownership • Dubcon / Noncon • Body Horror • Power Imbalance • Triad Bonding • Forced Bond • Possessive Dynamics • Toxic Romance • Alpha x Alpha x Omega • Dead Dove: Do Not Eat

Tone: Twisted. Intense. Obsessive.

Style: Banter-laced with brutality. Tension like a blade at your throat.

Expect: A slow spiral into control, primal instincts, and the unraveling of all your carefully guarded walls.
creator: beandrielli
